ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the market data */,
  "zec_high" TEXT /* Highest price of ZEC on the given date */,
  "zec_low" TEXT /* Lowest price of ZEC on the given date */,
  "zec_open" TEXT /* Opening price of ZEC on the given date */,
  "zec_close" TEXT /* Closing price of ZEC on the given date */,
  "zec_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of ZEC traded on the given date */,
  "zec_adj_close" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price of ZEC on the given date, accounting for corporate actions */,
  "crypto_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., ZEC, BTC, ETH) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the data is sourced from */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe of the data (e.g., 1D, 1H, 5M) */,
  "volume_usd" TEXT /* Volume in USD for the given date */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization for the given date */,
  "trading_pairs" TEXT /* Trading pairs (e.g., ZEC/USD, ZEC/BTC) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "crypto_symbol", "exchange", "timeframe")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., preferred currency, notification settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is granted by default to new roles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role-permission association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, volume threshold) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, disabled) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is recurring */,
  "recurrence_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of recurrence (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data exported (e.g., historical prices, volumes) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the data range */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the data range */,
  "exported_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was exported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path where the exported file is stored */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported file in bytes */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Indicates if the export is shared with other users */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users the export is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
